hero.title: Shisha charcoal briquettes for importers who run the numbers

address.companyName: PT Coco Reina Global Charcoal Indonesia

description.label: About PT Coco Reina Global Charcoal Indonesia
description.p1Prefix: PT Coco Reina Global Charcoal Indonesia, working under the registered brand
description.p1Suffix: , is an Indonesian direct manufacturer and wholesale exporter of 100% natural coconut shell charcoal briquettes specifically engineered for shisha and hookah applications.
description.p2: Officially established in 2018 (Company Registration NIB: 0220001680488, National Tax ID: 94.608.951.3-524.000) with its primary manufacturing facility located at Jl. Mayor Unus KM 1.5, Magelang, Central Java, Indonesia, the company sustains a production capacity of 12 tons per day.
description.p3: Operating under the executive direction of Wilson Gosalim, Henry Gosalim, Gatot Wibowo, and charcoal expert Greg Ryabtsev.
description.p4: The factory is certified by ISO 9001:2015 standards (audit by Carsurin & Backjorindo laboratoires). We ensure uncompromising compliance with global maritime logistics, strictly adhering to IMDG Code UN 1361 Class 4.2 spontaneous combustion safety protocols, independent Self-Heating Tests (SHT), and the provision of fully authenticated Preferential Certificates of Origin for international container shipping.
